title: Eucnide rupestris
intro: Eucnide rupestris, also known as the rock eucnide or rock eucnide shrub, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, belonging to the family Solanaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, improve wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. Traditionally, Eucnide rupestris has been used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions, including arthritis, wounds, and respiratory issues.
